mapper.sql: id, biz_type, demand_id, order_id, sender_id, receiver_id, msg_type, content, file_url, extra_json, read_status, status, read_at, created_at
mapper.select: select from `chat_message` where status in (1, 2) and (sender_id = #{userId} or receiver_id = #{userId}) order by created_at desc, id desc
select from `chat_message` where status in (1, 2) order by created_at desc, id desc
